---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new LLM provider, retrieval strategy, or chatbot improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: casper-justus
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves
What limitation or gap does this address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your suggested implementation or approach.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context
Anything else that would help evaluate this request.
